purpose: Track source requirements for future official World Cup fantasy data imports without inventing official fantasy prices, player IDs, positions, squads, rules, deadlines, or scoring.

source_entry_schema.source_type: One of official_fantasy_rules, official_fantasy_player_data, official_squads, official_fixture_schedule, official_fantasy_deadlines, or supporting_source.
source_entry_schema.url: Public source URL or null when the source has not been identified.
source_entry_schema.checked_at: ISO date or null when not checked.
source_entry_schema.fields_used: Array of field names populated from this source.
source_entry_schema.confidence: Confidence label such as official, supporting, candidate_unchecked, or todo_missing_source.

sources.notes: Public FIFA Play help-pages JSON. English how_to_play entry id 793 contains the detailed official rules used in data/imports/officialFantasyRules.json.
Public FIFA Play rounds JSON. Used for round-level lock references alongside the fixed and rolling lockout rules in the official help page.
Official FIFA launch article used as corroborating context only; detailed values come from FIFA Play help-pages JSON.
Public FIFA Play language JSON used to corroborate app labels, modal text, and transfer penalty copy.

todo: Review data/imports/officialFantasyRules.json before any promotion into active fantasyRules.json.
Do not use root fantasyRules.json as an official source; it is Week 5 draft logic.
Keep the Mystery Booster effect null until FIFA publishes or reveals it in an official source.
Re-check round start/deadline sources immediately before active promotion.
Identify the official FIFA fantasy player-list source or user-provided export when available.
Do not copy proxy prices into official_price.
Do not infer official fantasy positions from roster positions.
Create identity-review rows for missing or ambiguous official player IDs.

sources.notes: Official FIFA squad announcements hub was re-checked. The checked web/search surfaces did not provide complete parseable player-level final squad rows for this import pass.
Used to stage data/imports/officialSquads.csv rows as selectable_fantasy_player or review only. This source does not independently prove confirmed_final_squad status.
Public FIFA Play team metadata used to corroborate country/team coverage. It does not contain player-level final squad rows.
Official FIFA search API surface was checked for squad announcement discovery. It did not provide complete player-level final squad rows suitable for import in this pass.

todo: Replace selectable_fantasy_player rows with confirmed_final_squad rows only after source-backed complete final squads are imported.
Do not mark team_squad_complete true unless the source covers the full final squad.
Resolve review rows where fantasy status is transferred before model-input promotion.
Preserve source_url and source_checked on every row.

sources.notes: Copied from data/sourceManifest.json for inventory only. This session did not re-check the URL and did not create officialFixtureSchedule_v1.json.

todo: Create data/officialFixtureSchedule_v1.json only after deciding whether official fixture refresh is part of the official-data import stage.
Include UTC kickoff, local kickoff, venue, city, source_url, and source_checked for every fixture row.
Do not add fantasy deadlines from fixture kickoff times unless official fantasy rules define that relationship.
Identify the official fantasy deadline source when available.
Keep deadline fields null until official fantasy rules or official game data backs them.
Keep Matchday Desk, captain, and substitution warnings manual while deadlines are missing.
Add supporting sources here only when they are used to enrich official import rows.
Supporting sources may enrich club, league, role, or identity-review context only.
Supporting sources must never overwrite official fantasy price, position, player ID, rules, deadlines, or final squad status.

known_gaps: data/imports/officialSquads.csv still has 0 confirmed_final_squad rows, 0 teams marked complete, and 225 review rows from fantasy status transferred.
data/imports/officialSquads.csv is staged from official fantasy player data but contains 0 confirmed_final_squad rows.
Official fantasy rules are imported into a staging file only and are not active model inputs yet.
Mystery Booster effect is not source-backed yet.
Final official squads are not imported as complete confirmed_final_squad rows.
Official fantasy rules, deadlines, scoring, and squad limits have not been promoted into active fantasyRules.json or browser-ready fantasyRulesData.js.
collection_notes: This manifest is a readiness structure, not evidence that official fantasy data is ready.
Existing fixture and squad URLs were copied from data/sourceManifest.json and were not re-checked in this session.
Empty sources arrays are intentional TODO placeholders where no source-backed official import exists in the repo.
Candidate FIFA country-article URLs from data/players.json were captured for follow-up only; they were not used as final-squad proof in this staging pass.
